package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_lookup_double_access: `if _, ok := m[k]; ok { v := m[k] }` - two map lookups for the same key
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule616PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario616Positive(records []Rule616PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
